sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires phone plus continuation facts to converge but does not fully define field precedence between spoken, keypad, transcript, continuation, and support-entered data.
decisionTaken: For telephony, use continuation > keypad > transcript > spoken > support > web. For secure link, use continuation > web > support > keypad > transcript > spoken. For support-assisted capture, use support > continuation > keypad > transcript > spoken > web.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The order favors later patient-entered continuation data and typed support capture while preserving all source provenance in the frozen bundle.
operationalRisk: A wrong precedence order can change clinical meaning without an auditable source manifest.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Version phase2-field-precedence-193.v1 and regenerate precedence tests.
